# OrientCare

> OrientCare provides bilingual Spanish and English medical navigation, appointment coordination, and hospital accompaniment for international patients seeking medical care in China.

OrientCare helps foreign nationals prepare for medical visits in China, especially in Beijing, by clarifying hospital options, appointment requirements, language needs, route planning, on-site registration, consultation support, and follow-up coordination.

Spanish summary: OrientCare acompaña a pacientes internacionales de habla hispana e inglesa antes, durante y después de su atención médica en China.

Primary audiences: Spanish-speaking and English-speaking international patients, families, expatriates, business travelers, and medical travelers outside China.

Primary languages: Spanish and English.

Contact email: hello@orientcare.org.

Medical note: OrientCare coordinates medical navigation and accompaniment services. It does not provide diagnosis, treatment, emergency care, or replace the judgment of licensed medical professionals.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.orientcare.org/): Overview of OrientCare, bilingual medical support in China, service model, and patient testimonials.
- [About OrientCare](https://www.orientcare.org/#about): Company background, values, and role as a trusted bridge between international patients and the Chinese medical system.
- [Services](https://www.orientcare.org/#services): Pre-visit guidance, hospital selection, appointment coordination, document preparation, in-hospital accompaniment, interpretation support, and post-visit follow-up.
- [Hospitals](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): Guide to selected Beijing hospitals and international departments for complex care, cardiovascular medicine, pediatrics, neurology, traditional Chinese medicine, and general specialties.
- [Contact](https://www.orientcare.org/#contact): Contact form and email for medical travel inquiries in Spanish or English.

## Services

- [Pre-Visit Medical Navigation](https://www.orientcare.org/#services): Review patient needs, identify relevant specialties, compare hospital options, and prepare visit requirements.
- [Appointment Coordination](https://www.orientcare.org/#services): Support appointment planning, route information, required documents, and communication before arrival.
- [Hospital Accompaniment](https://www.orientcare.org/#services): Assistance with reception, registration, hospital navigation, and language support during the visit.
- [Follow-Up Support](https://www.orientcare.org/#services): Help patients understand next steps, reports, prescriptions, referrals, and future appointments.

## Hospital Coverage

- [Peking Union Medical College Hospital International Medical Services](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): Strong for complex, rare, severe, internal medicine, surgery, obstetrics and gynecology, and pediatrics.
- [Fuwai Hospital, CAMS International Department](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): National-level cardiovascular care for coronary disease, arrhythmia, hypertension, heart failure, and cardiac surgery.
- [China-Japan Friendship Hospital International Department](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): International services with respiratory medicine, dermatology, obstetrics and gynecology, digestive endoscopy, and multidisciplinary care.
- [Beijing Friendship Hospital International Medical Center](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): International medical services, health checkups, digestive and liver care, oncology, nutrition, and rehabilitation.
- [Beijing Tiantan Hospital International Department](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): Known for neurosurgery, neurology, neuro-oncology, cerebrovascular disease, ICU, and interventional care.
- [Beijing Children's Hospital International Medical Department](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): High-end pediatric services including pediatric hematology, oncology, neurology, neonatology, and respiratory care.
- [Guang'anmen Hospital International Medical Department](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): Traditional Chinese medicine services including TCM oncology, dermatology, anorectal care, endocrinology, gynecology, and pediatrics.
- [Peking University International Hospital](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): Non-profit general hospital with international medicine, oncology, women and children's care, emergency care, ICU, geriatrics, and MDT services.
- [Beijing Chaoyang Hospital International Medical Department](https://www.orientcare.org/#hospitals): International medical services covering respiratory medicine, obstetrics and gynecology, painless endoscopy, hyperbaric oxygen, and MDT care.

## Optional

- [Email OrientCare](mailto:hello@orientcare.org): Direct contact for partnership, patient navigation, and medical travel service inquiries.
